name: engineers-journey
description: An Engineer's Journey — a playable Middle-earth portfolio (Gandalf the Grey). Prateek Kumar Mohanty.

scripts.merge:gandalf: node scripts/merge-gandalf.mjs && npx --yes @gltf-transform/cli webp public/assets/models/gandalf.glb public/assets/models/gandalf.glb && npx --yes @gltf-transform/cli draco public/assets/models/gandalf.glb public/assets/models/gandalf.glb
